reasoning: The update.bash script flagged as unsafe is a maintainer helper tool not executed during package build/install. All files involved in makepkg execution (PKGBUILD, hooks) are safe with verified downloads from official sources.
disagreement_analysis: qwen incorrectly classified update.bash as unsafe due to its external API call, despite it being a non-executed maintainer script irrelevant to runtime safety.
false_positives: update.bash (qwen): Maintainer helper script not executed during makepkg; normal for AUR maintenance
learnings: Improve distinction between build-time executables and maintainer tools in file prioritization
Enhance prompt clarity: Explicitly exclude non-build scripts (CI/maintainer tools) from security assessment scope
Add automated filtering for files not referenced in PKGBUILD/.install hooks
Train models to recognize benign update patterns common in AUR ecosystems
